title: Roasted Fingerling Potatoes
description: Fingerling potatoes halved and roasted cut-side down at high heat with smoked paprika and garlic powder. Deeply caramelized on the cut side, fluffy inside.

instructions.text: Halve fingerling potatoes lengthwise. Toss with olive oil, salt, pepper, smoked paprika, and garlic powder. Spread cut-side down in a single layer on a sheet pan — cut side down is critical for caramelization. Into the oven.
At the 20-minute mark, check the cut side. It should be golden and caramelized. If not, give them 5 more minutes before flipping. Flip and return to oven.
Potatoes are done when deeply golden on the cut sides and tender through the center, about 35–40 minutes total. Serve immediately.

notes:
Don't rush the flip -- the crust on the cut side is the whole point. If they're sticking when you try to flip, they need more time.

Works as a dipping side with the lemon garlic yogurt sauce from the Cedar Plank Salmon recipe.
